case_title: RICCI A. POWERS VS. ROBERT HADEN GARRETT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POWERS, RICCI A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARRETT, ROBERT HADEN $9,815.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,990.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2016 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GARRETT, ROBERT HADEN
